projects.title_en: Futuristic Web Interface: Canarias Nexus Secure Protocol
projects.title_es: Interfaz Web Futurista: Canarias Nexus Protocolo Secure
projects.desc_en: Design and development of a minimalist, high-end landing page featuring a cyberpunk and corporate aesthetic. The web interface utilizes a dark, dramatic aerial photograph of Mount Teide as a backdrop. The design seamlessly integrates advanced web technologies with futuristic visual elements, creating an immersive user experience.

Design and development of a minimalist, high-end landing page featuring a cyberpunk and corporate aesthetic. The web interface utilizes a dark, dramatic aerial photograph of Mount Teide in Tenerife as its background, blanketed in deep twilight and golden tones. It showcases an elegant serif typography for the main headline "El cénit de la convergencia" and stylized call-to-action (CTA) buttons, including a prominent ochre yellow button ("EXPLORAR TESIS") and a secondary text-only button ("INICIAR CUSTODIA"). The visual concept successfully conveys security, identity custody, and cutting-edge technology.
projects.desc_es: Diseño y desarrollo de una página de aterrizaje (landing page) minimalista y de alta gama con una estética cyberpunk y corporativa. La interfaz web utiliza como fondo una fotografía aérea dramática del Teide. El diseño integra de forma armoniosa tecnologías web avanzadas con elementos visuales futuristas, creando una experiencia de usuario inmersiva.

projects.title_en: The Forest's Secret: Ladybugs and Amanitas
projects.title_es: El Secreto del Bosque: Mariquitas y Amanitas
projects.desc_en: A stunning fantasy macro photograph capturing a dynamic close-up of several giant ladybugs exploring a sun-drenched forest floor. In the center, vibrant red mushrooms with white spots stand like sentinels in a mystical landscape. The composition creates depth and wonder, inviting viewers into an enchanted micro-world.
projects.desc_es: Una impresionante macrofotografía de fantasía que captura un dinámico primer plano de varias mariquitas gigantes explorando el suelo de un bosque iluminado por el sol. En el centro, vibrantes hongos rojos con manchas blancas se erigen como centinelas en un paisaje místico. La composición crea profundidad y maravilla, invitando a los espectadores a un micro-mundo encantado.
